what_was_built: reports/crypto_d1_protocol_v1/protocol.md (human-readable: BTC/ETH/SOL spot daily 24/7; 7 strategy families with mean_reversion WATCH-only; 9-phase P0..P8 validation ladder; PASS/WATCH/FAIL rules + kill conditions + no-profit-claim policy)
tests/test_crypto_d1_protocol.py (21 tests covering schema + safety + integration)
tools/strategy_candidate_registry.py: extra_files for the v1 memo + new per-seed lane_status_override mechanism; crypto_d1 lane re-opened from PARKED to WATCH when the v1 memo exists on disk

distinction_phrases_required_in_md: Crypto trend ideas are not profitable until tested
A good historical chart does not imply future returns
No backtest is authorized by this protocol alone

tests_run.command: python -m pytest tests/test_crypto_d1_protocol.py tests/test_arbitrage_readiness_gate.py tests/test_arbitrage_sample_dataset_plan.py tests/test_arbitrage_data_source_evaluation.py tests/test_arbitrage_qa_harness_spec.py tests/test_arbitrage_dataset_manifest.py tests/test_arbitrage_data_contract.py tests/test_arbitrage_research_protocol.py tests/test_strategy_candidate_registry.py tests/test_strategy_next_bundle.py --rootdir=tests -q

candidate_registry_status_for_crypto_d1_.promoted_from_PARKED_via: lane_status_override='WATCH' (fires because the seed's extra_files include the v1 memo, which now exists on disk)
guardrails_held: never STRONG evidence in the auto-build path
historical CODR-1 closeouts remain authoritative for prior versions (override gated on v1 memo on-disk presence)

next_bundle_generator_selection_after_up.title: Arbitrage research protocol
next_bundle_generator_selection_after_up.note: Both arbitrage and crypto_d1 are now WATCH (same +15 bonus). Arbitrage wins via existing protocol-first/data-first scoring hints in its queue item. Deterministic logic NOT artificially modified. Operator should consult both lanes' next-step lists to pick the actual Bundle 12.

how_this_starts_the_crypto_lane_after_ar: Crypto-D1 lane re-opened at WATCH via Bundle 11 v1 protocol memo.
Two parallel research lanes, both research-monitorable, neither ACTIVE.
Next Bundle 12 picks one of: Crypto-D1 Data Contract v1 / Crypto-D1 Dataset Manifest v1 / Crypto-D1 Data QA-Freeze Spec v1 / Crypto-D1 Baseline Backtest Plan v1.
recommended_next_bundle: Crypto-D1 Data Contract v1 (defines fields/freeze/fees/validity for any future daily crypto dataset; spec only, no data pull)
Crypto-D1 Dataset Manifest v1 (per-dataset manifest schema for the crypto-D1 lane; spec only)
Crypto-D1 Data QA / Freeze Spec v1 (QA harness spec for daily-crypto data; spec only, no harness run)
Crypto-D1 Baseline Backtest Plan v1 (pre-registration memo for the FIRST family + IS/OOS split; plan only, no backtest run)
